action.description: May procurement renew a contract under delegated authority?

context.action_boundary: May procurement renew a contract under delegated authority?
context.anomaly_observed: A delegation memo exists, but delegated authority depends on term, renewal class, and amount.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Renewal REN-QUA-045 renews Quanta Systems support for 9 months at USD 94000 effective 2026-06-26.
Delegation DEL-QUA-045 covers Quanta Systems support renewal, term up to 12 months, amount ceiling USD 100000, effective before 2026-06-26.
Board note says renewals above 12 months or USD 100000 require board review.

policy_documents.content: Delegated renewal authority is complete only when approval matches vendor, renewal class, term length, amount ceiling, and effective date before renewal.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
